nasb.text: The king’s servants said to him, “Behold, Haman is standing in the court.” And the king said, “Let him come in.”

esv.text: And the king’s young men told him, “Haman is there, standing in the court.” And the king said, “Let him come in.”

cnv.text: 王的臣僕對他說：“是哈曼站在院子裡。”王說：“叫他進來。”

ccb.text: 服侍王的臣仆回答说：“是哈曼站在院子里。”王说：“让他进来。”
